general.name: Restrictions Payment Tech iCloud Exemption
general.description: Apple Pay Integration use case approved by Eric Munz John Fitz 3/18/22
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>016AE400-CB9C-4496-8D08-0064C0A32612</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>016AE400-CB9C-4496-8D08-0064C0A32612</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Restrictions Payment Tech iCloud Exemption</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Apple Pay Integration use case approved by Eric Munz John Fitz 3/18/22</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>414E9440-4804-4C9F-B5B7-3CFA3746B621</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.MCX</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>414E9440-4804-4C9F-B5B7-3CFA3746B621</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>MCX</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>safariAllowAutoFill</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>D0A4EC01-B7FF-4DE1-84D3-ACD95B100381</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.applicationaccess.new</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>D0A4EC01-B7FF-4DE1-84D3-ACD95B100381</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Application Restrictions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>familyControlsEnabled</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>21B6A919-78A4-4AA4-9FEC-8F38CF82957E</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.coremediaio.support</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>21B6A919-78A4-4AA4-9FEC-8F38CF82957E</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>CoreMediaIO Support</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>Device Access Allowed</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>58D027BD-D2C4-44F7-BD27-B17D652F72CE</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.DiscRecording</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>58D027BD-D2C4-44F7-BD27-B17D652F72CE</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Media Access: Disc Recording</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>BurnSupport</key><string>on</string></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>94D37E77-3892-4827-9B20-C45E6AC30074</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.appstore</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>94D37E77-3892-4827-9B20-C45E6AC30074</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>App Store</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>restrict-store-softwareupdate-only</key><false/><key>restrict-store-disable-app-adoption</key><true/><key>DisableSoftwareUpdateNotifications</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>8CFEB985-6FD4-4C66-B05A-63727491589B</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.dashboard</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>8CFEB985-6FD4-4C66-B05A-63727491589B</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Dashboard Widget Restrictions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>whiteListEnabled</key><false/><key>WhiteList</key><array/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>32718B8D-EE5A-4B2C-9157-788293493265</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.finder</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>32718B8D-EE5A-4B2C-9157-788293493265</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Media Access: Finder Settings</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>ProhibitBurn</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>08776C0B-FC89-4993-883B-BE31ACBCF3CA</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.gamed</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>08776C0B-FC89-4993-883B-BE31ACBCF3CA</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Game Center</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>GKFeatureGameCenterAllowed</key><false/><key>GKFeatureAccountModificationAllowed</key><true/><key>GKFeatureAddingGameCenterFriendsAllowed</key><true/><key>GKFeatureMultiplayerGamingAllowed</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>29169DCF-5ECA-43AA-8184-66C652A40DAC</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.applicationaccess</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>29169DCF-5ECA-43AA-8184-66C652A40DAC</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Restrictions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>forceUnpromptedManagedClassroomScreenObservation</key><false/><key>allowCloudDocumentSync</key><false/><key>allowCloudDesktopAndDocuments</key><false/><key>allowSpotlightInternetResults</key><true/><key>allowMusicService</key><true/><key>allowCloudKeychainSync</key><false/><key>allowCloudBTMM</key><false/><key>allowCloudFMM</key><false/><key>allowCloudBookmarks</key><true/><key>allowCloudMail</key><true/><key>allowCloudCalendar</key><true/><key>allowCloudReminders</key><true/><key>allowCloudAddressBook</key><true/><key>allowCloudNotes</key><true/><key>allowPasswordSharing</key><true/><key>allowPasswordAutoFill</key><true/><key>allowPasswordProximityRequests</key><true/><key>allowCamera</key><true/><key>allowContentCaching</key><true/><key>allowCloudPrivateRelay</key><true/><key>allowUniversalControl</key><true/><key>allowAirDrop</key><false/><key>allowRapidSecurityResponseInstallation</key><true/><key>allowRapidSecurityResponseRemoval</key><true/><key>allowUIConfigurationProfileInstallation</key><true/><key>allowUSBRestrictedMode</key><true/><key>allowCloudFreeform</key><true/><key>allowLocalUserCreation</key><true/><key>allowStartupDiskModification</key><true/><key>allowTimeMachineBackup</key><true/><key>allowARDRemoteManagementModification</key><true/><key>allowBluetoothSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowFileSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowInternetSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowPrinterSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowRemoteAppleEventsModification</key><true/><key>allowAccountModification</key><true/><key>allowDeviceNameModification</key><true/><key>allowAssistant</key><true/><key>allowFingerprintModification</key><true/><key>allowCloudPhotoLibrary</key><true/><key>allowGenmoji</key><false/><key>allowImagePlayground</key><false/><key>allowiPhoneMirroring</key><false/><key>allowWritingTools</key><false/><key>forceBypassScreenCaptureAlert</key><false/><key>allowMailSummary</key><false/><key>allowMediaSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowExternalIntelligenceIntegrations</key><false/><key>allowNotesTranscriptionSummary</key><false/><key>allowAppleIntelligenceReport</key><false/><key>allowMailSmartReplies</key><false/><key>allowSafariSummary</key><false/><key>allowNotesTranscription</key><false/><key>allowSafariHistoryClearing</key><true/><key>allowSafariPrivateBrowsing</key><true/><key>forceDelayedSoftwareUpdates</key><false/><key>forceDelayedAppSoftwareUpdates</key><false/><key>forceDelayedMajorSoftwareUpdates</key><false/><key>allowAirPrint</key><true/><key>forceAirPrintTrustedTLSRequirement</key><false/><key>allowAirPrintiBeaconDiscovery</key><true/><key>allowScreenShot</key><true/><key>allowRemoteScreenObservation</key><true/><key>forceClassroomUnpromptedScreenObservation</key><false/><key>forceUnpromptedManagedClassroomScreenObservation</key><false/><key>allowFingerprintForUnlock</key><true/><key>enforcedFingerprintTimeout</key><integer>172800</integer><key>forceClassroomUnpromptedAppAndDeviceLock</key><false/><key>forceClassroomAutomaticallyJoinClasses</key><false/><key>forceClassroomRequestPermissionToLeaveClasses</key><false/><key>allowEraseContentAndSettings</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>D6ECD1E3-56AC-4A9C-8D12-ADFB75E7CBB2</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.systempreferences</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>D6ECD1E3-56AC-4A9C-8D12-ADFB75E7CBB2</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>System Preferences</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>DisabledPreferencePanes</key><array><string>com.apple.preferences.appstore</string><string>com.apple.preference.digihub.discs</string><string>com.apple.ClassroomSettings</string><string>com.apple.preferences.extensions</string><string>com.apple.preferences.FamilySharingPrefPane</string><string>com.apple.prefpanel.fibrechannel</string><string>com.apple.preferences.icloud</string><string>com.apple.preference.ink</string><string>com.apple.preferences.internetaccounts</string><string>com.apple.preference.internet</string><string>com.apple.preferences.parentalcontrols</string><string>com.apple.preference.startupdisk</string><string>com.apple.Xsan</string></array></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>BB716FAA-4ABA-4744-96D2-69D693C82DFB</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.preferences.users</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>BB716FAA-4ABA-4744-96D2-69D693C82DFB</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>User Preferences</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>DisableUsingiCloudPassword</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>22493052-110F-4691-A2B3-E6201932CCE6</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.systemuiserver</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>22493052-110F-4691-A2B3-E6201932CCE6</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Media Access</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>logout-eject</key><dict/><key>mount-controls</key><dict><key>cd</key><array><string>eject</string><string>alert</string></array><key>harddisk-internal</key><array/><key>disk-image</key><array/><key>dvd</key><array><string>eject</string><string>alert</string></array><key>blankdvd</key><array><string>eject</string><string>alert</string></array><key>harddisk-external</key><array><string>read-only</string></array><key>blankcd</key><array><string>eject</string><string>alert</string></array><key>dvdram</key><array><string>eject</string><string>alert</string></array></dict></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>484E2289-2589-471A-BE75-F46EB7739F0A</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.desktop</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>484E2289-2589-471A-BE75-F46EB7739F0A</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Desktop</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>96C73597-1798-413F-8707-D6EDD4F1C824</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.ShareKitHelper</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>96C73597-1798-413F-8707-D6EDD4F1C824</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Restrictions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>SHKAllowedShareServices</key><array><string>com.apple.reminders.RemindersShareExtension</string><string>com.apple.Notes.SharingExtension</string><string>com.apple.share.Messages</string></array></dict></array></dict></plist>
